{
  "claims": [
    "SB 554 legislation will bolster legal protections for survivors of abuse by expanding the ability to obtain a restraining order.",
    "SB 554 represents a significant stride towards safeguarding individuals and their families from further harm.",
    "The Survivors Protection Act can impact the lives of 9 million resident survivors and 258 annual California visitors navigating safety challenges.",
    "California has made strides in survivor protection, but immense progress remains necessary.",
    "Strengthening efforts at the city, county, and state levels is the best way to ensure high-quality care for survivors of violence.",
    "Substance use and intimate partner violence are often linked, with many women turning to drugs and alcohol as an escape from abuse."
  ]
}
